24:27 â August 2, 2024
Update to the Enterprise Fraud Management Part
We added content to the EFM part regarding wires in Decision Mode. The newly added content is based off of the recently released
job aid
that assists with the various scenarios wires experience in Decision Mode.
Electronic Transactions Volume
Enterprise Fraud Management Part
Section 8.1, Overview of Managing Transaction Alerts
We updated some images to coincide better with the provided information. We also removed any Monitor Mode wire information that is no longer relevant.
Section 8.3, Identifying a Transaction as Legitimate
We added clarification to the No-risk Reason,
âe-Transfer: Confirmed Legitimate â Customer Wants to Cancelâ. This No-risk reason canât be used as a no-risk reason for a wire.
Section 8.4, Identifying Alerts in Auto Risk Transactions
We removed any Monitor Mode wire information that is no longer relevant.
Section 8.7, Wires in EFM and the Wires Application
We added a new section to discuss wires in the EFM and Wires application environments.
